rulings.Case Title: JOHN JOHNSTON VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Entered Against Associated Insulation Of California, Inc.
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for July 28, 2016, Thursday, in Department 503, Line 1. Fireman's Fund Insurance Company's motion to set aside default and default judgment entered against Associated Insulation of California, Inc. is continued on the court's own motion to August 17, 2016. = (503/GLW)
